CameraConfig.description: Camera configuration and clip source selection.
CameraConfig.title: CameraConfig

ClipStatus.description:
Clip processing status values.

Represents the high-level status of a clip in the processing pipeline.
ClipStatus.title: ClipStatus

ConfigResponse.description: Returns the full config (secrets shown as env var names, not values).
ConfigResponse.title: ConfigResponse

FilterConfig.description:
Base filter configuration (plugin-agnostic).

Plugin-specific config is stored in the 'config' field.
- During YAML parsing: dict[str, Any] (preserves all third-party fields)
- After plugin discovery: BaseModel subclass (validated against plugin.config_model)

Note: Plugin names are validated against the registry at runtime via
validate_plugin_names(). This allows third-party plugins via entry points.
FilterConfig.title: FilterConfig

FinalizeRequest.description: Finalize setup by writing the assembled config and requesting restart.
FinalizeRequest.title: FinalizeRequest

FinalizeResponse.description: Finalize setup response for onboarding UI.
FinalizeResponse.title: FinalizeResponse

RuntimeState.description: Lifecycle state for the active runtime.
RuntimeState.title: RuntimeState

SetupStatusResponse.description: Current setup completion state used by onboarding flows.
SetupStatusResponse.title: SetupStatusResponse

StoragePathsConfig.description: Logical storage paths for different artifact types.
StoragePathsConfig.title: StoragePathsConfig

VLMConfig.description:
Base VLM configuration.

Backend-specific config is stored in the 'config' field.
- During YAML parsing: dict[str, Any] (preserves all third-party fields)
- After plugin discovery: BaseModel subclass (validated against plugin.config_model)

Note: Backend names are validated against the registry at runtime via
validate_plugin_names(). This allows third-party VLM plugins via entry points.
VLMConfig.title: VLMConfig

VLMPreprocessConfig.description: Preprocessing configuration for VLM frame extraction.
VLMPreprocessConfig.title: VLMPreprocessConfig

VLMRunMode.description: Policy for when to run VLM analysis.
VLMRunMode.title: VLMRunMode

schema.title: Response List Cameras Api V1 Cameras Get

get.description: List clips with filtering and keyset pagination.

delete.description: Delete a clip and its storage object.

get.description: Stream clip media through HomeSec for in-app playback.

post.description:
Create media playback URL.

When auth is disabled, returns direct media URL with tokenized=False and expires_at=None.
When auth is enabled, returns tokenized URL with tokenized=True and non-null expires_at.
Trigger WS-Discovery scan and return discovered ONVIF cameras.

schema.title: Response Discover Onvif Cameras Api V1 Onvif Discover Post

post.description: Probe an ONVIF camera for device info, profiles, and stream URIs.
Trigger runtime reload and return async acceptance outcome.
Persist finalized setup config and request graceful restart.
Run setup preflight checks for onboarding UX.

get.description: Return setup completion status for onboarding UX.
